Self_Evaluate_Themes.description: Per-session self-evaluation archive. One entry per session_id (composite PK: session_id, or (title,date) fallback). Read by /eval_dashboard.

patterns.A: Premature / unverified conclusion — declared something impossible, done, or correct without actually attempting or measuring it (e.g. 'can't be done', 'lint passes so it's right').
patterns.B: Over-deferral — punted work that was immediately addressable, or under-delivered vs the stated goal.
patterns.D: Tool-routing / process misstep — wrong tool, skipped gate, or convention violation.
patterns.E: Failure cascade — critical failure, data loss, or repeated user frustration.

structured_entries.title: External-conform real-asset download + hero-fidelity fixes
corrections: Prior-session verdict 'itch.io download is JS-gated / unautomatable' was wrong — user pushed back ('I thought that was within your capabilities'); a 4-hop CSRF curl flow downloaded the binary in minutes.

Conformed wizard shipped a visual defect (book fused into the face) that PASSED lint — user caught it by eye. Root cause: _material_for hue-matched desaturated pixels onto the skin ramp; lint validates palette/orphans/contract, not recognizability.
Conform crushed premium external art to ~26px (small-unit band), undermining Track 2's 'artist-quality' purpose — user questioned the fidelity reduction and whether art instructions were stale.
structured_entries.key_takeaway: An inherited 'X is impossible' verdict is a hypothesis, not a fact — re-attempt before accepting it (the 'JS-gated' download was trivially scriptable). // An automated gate passing (lint) is not proof of correctness when it cannot measure the actual goal (recognizability); semantic/visual regressions need the human gate, and a synthetic fixture built to pass the checks structurally hides what real input triggers.
structured_entries.notes: First entry; archive + pattern legend created this session. Post-compaction (2 events). All corrections originated from inherited prior-session work (Part D external conform) that the user re-opened; fixes shipped this session (denoise + saturation guard + body-fidelity knobs, all TDD'd). Per-animation scaling artifact deferred to Hero A/B/C Bake-off as an explicit roadmap GATING item per user. Lessons captured in auto-memory (gotcha_itch_io_free_download_scriptable, gotcha_synthetic_fixture_hides_real_input_failure); no CLAUDE.md/Skill/hook change proposed (would bloat always-loaded surface for once-fired lessons).

structured_entries.title: UI Art System architecture brainstorm (--red-team)
structured_entries.key_takeaway: A --red-team capstone's first-party code-read caught a cross-project memory false-positive (PushinPotions 'Global autoload' from the passively-loaded sibling MEMORY.md was shaping a DraconicWars ThemeService design; DW has zero autoloads). Recalled passive-memory facts naming repo-specific artifacts must be verified first-party. The multi-agent red-team passes earned their cost: they also caught a TextureFilter-on-Texture2D API error and a non-hermetic test plan that Socratic alone would have missed.
structured_entries.notes: Architecture brainstorm for the UI Art System Part; --red-team ran 3 passes (Step-2 + Step-4 Mode B, Step-7 Mode A), ~12 critic agents total. Output entirely in the Obsidian vault (ui-art-system.md design doc + roadmap.md: UI Art System -> plan-pending, +3 arch-pending siblings) plus 2 .claude/auto-memory files; ZERO .cs changes (regression gate exempt). Surfaced a harness misconfig: this DW session passively auto-loaded PushinPotions' MEMORY.md (native memory-dir config, not the project hook). No CLAUDE.md/skill/hook edit proposed — the learning is a gotcha (auto-memory, saved via autolearn) + a harness-config recommendation, not an instruction-adherence gap.

structured_entries.title: Flyer body-plan family + grander dragons (CBPT completion)
structured_entries.key_takeaway: Differentiate creatures at the body-plan/silhouette level, not surface trim (wing-fill). Viewing the rendered PNG is non-negotiable — lint passes art that reads wrong (fire caterpillar vs eastern dragon). Element palette silently trips the whitelist cap when accent/hot collides with a major body color (venom skin==accent, frost hot==accent).
structured_entries.notes: Post-compaction continued session, run as two /goals + a /session_end. Opened by addressing a Stop-hook gap (delivering per-task ideal-workflow recommendations the prior turn had executed-but-not-articulated). Goal = flyer creative uniqueness (prior wing-trim approach was insufficient) + grander/bigger dragons. Delivered: FlyerConfig.body_plan axis (drake/wyrm/seraph/wisp/manta), cinder_wyrmling->wyrm in-roster, elder_drake->80px + grander _draw_dragon; then user-authorized (AskUserQuestion) fixing 3 pre-existing ground-unit lint failures (FloatingShards grounding, SpiderLegs/bog_stalker height, boreal crystal-spike clamp). Verified byte-identity (only 6 intended sheets changed), all batches lint-clean, distinctness PASS, 13 python self-tests PASS, C# RosterArtContractTest PASS. CBPT Part marked complete on roadmap (hand-edited — /update_roadmap cannot reach the vault-located roadmap from the repo cwd). Self-caught a doc error during the critique pass: had drafted wing-type-first as the ideal workflow (the rejected approach) and inverted it to body-plan-first.

structured_entries.title: Roster expansion to 40 units + adversarial-review remediation (3 rounds)
memory_hits: feedback_separate_preexisting_changes_before_commit (drove the two-commit split: leftover art-report regen vs Round 3)
arch_rule_resource_config_runtime_split / shelter-aura ReferenceEquals precedent (informed rally self-exclusion fix)
structured_entries.key_takeaway: The multi-agent QA loop is the real safety net for self-introduced regressions in large content-expansion sessions: adversarial review caught 4 sim bugs in Round 1 and a scoped session_audit caught rally-aura self-boost + an untested non-stacking invariant — all on code that the green regression gate alone passed. Scope the audit to the un-reviewed delta so it complements (not re-treads) the earlier review.
structured_entries.notes: Mega-session (1656 msgs / 265 tool calls, 1 compaction). 40-unit roster + 6 forms + 11 sim primitives + rarity model + balance, then 23-finding adversarial review remediated over 3 rounds. Outcome 'clean' re USER corrections (none); quality issues were all self-caught by review/audit. TDD honored: rally aura and its self-exclusion fix were both RED->GREEN. memory_searches=2 is the post-compaction-window count (lower bound for the full session). Autolearn write landed in the PushinPotions auto-memory store (cross-project memory-dir misconfig already tracked in worklog).
